name: Freezer Mix Enchilada Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 cans Split ripe olives (2 1/4 oz each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Dip the container of frozen mix into hot water just to loosen it.
2. In a 2-quart saucepan, heat the frozen mix, water, olives, and chili powder over medium-high heat until boiling.
3. Reduce the heat to low, cover the pan, and simmer, stirring frequently, for about 20 minutes or until the mix is fully thawed.
4. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
5. In an ungreased baking dish measuring 11 3/4 x 7 1/2 x 1 3/4 inches, layer half of the tortillas, followed by the meat mixture and cheese.
6. Repeat the layers with remaining ingredients.
7. Bake uncovered for 30 to 40 minutes or until bubbly.
